summary: Excellent recording captures a memorable, high‑energy show that left fans awestruck.
review: Both reviewers praise the performance – one recalling an unforgettable visual spectacle and calling it a great show, while the other notes the set was solid with many nice moments. The audio is described as excellent overall, though there are occasional slips and drops that hint at minor technical hiccups.

ai_rating.rationale: Two moderately detailed reviews both rate the show positively (3‑4 stars) and highlight a strong performance plus generally good sound quality, leading to an overall rating around four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as excellent recording overall, but with some slips and drops noted by one reviewer.
